title: The Lost Tour: Vietnam
overview: Two friends from USA go on an exotic vacation in remote areas away from the city in Vietnam and dare to adventure where others do not. Little did the friends know that the forbidden area would unleash a force of flesh eating zombies forcing them to fight for their lives.
